economic_notes: First Nation holds 33% ownership in A.C. Forestry Ltd. and interest in A.C. Realty Ltd., both accounted for under modified equity method. Member of Agency Chiefs Tribal Council (ACTC). Operates a store and bison ranch.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence for investments in A.C. Forestry Ltd. and A.C. Realty Ltd., and absence of a budget as required by PSAS. The 2020 comparative statements were also qualified. Fiscal year end is March 31, 2021 but audit report is dated May 23, 2025 — very late filing. CMHC mortgage advance phase 13 of $814,064 received in year with no scheduled payments yet included in long-term debt. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($10,330,729) + ACTC ($275,682) + First Nations Trust ($171,331) + CMHC ($296,201) + ACFCS ($40,895) = $11,114,838. OSR includes AC Forestry income, interest, land leases, rent, administration fees, other revenue, gains on disposal, recognition of unexpended funding.
